name: Iter16 — History badge increments after new review
description: Verify that after analyzing a new PR and saving the review, the History badge count in the navbar increases by 1.

planSteps.description: A numeric badge is visible next to the 'History' link in the navbar — note its value
Type https://github.com/OWASP/NodeGoat/pull/300 in the PR URL input and click Analyze PR
Wait up to 90 seconds for the review to complete and the success toast to appear
The badge number next to 'History' in the navbar increased by 1 compared to before (e.g. if it was 31, it is now 32)
